Elon Musk April Tweets Market Heating Up | NO | MED confidence**

Polymarket's most active market is "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?", with traders pricing "1080-1119" at 18% probability amid $17.1M volume across tweet markets; real-time odds shift on new data like tweet counts.[1][2][4]
